subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is, verily, He through Whom that which lay hidden hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لهو الذی به ظهر ما کان مکنونا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
